comment.body: If u want a buy and sell, copy and paste the analysis  to chat gpt and tell him “ tell me when to buy or sell “ lol , in the end u need understand thst there is not 100% win rate, all analysis are on point , the thing is that ppls use the data in different ways , if u are a linear trader u can use it in one way, if u advance option strategy, another way, if u use the analysis to trade mag7 based in where is the spx is another way, u cant expect a buy and sell , cause everyone has a different risk tolerance, if u went all in long and got deleted is ur problem, if she said upside pivot is in the moon far away, dont touch it, soemtimes u have a nice upside pivot where u cant try to risk a long woth a proper risk management, not a 10 risk reward expecting 50 point and risking 2 points , cause higher win rate = lower risk reward , viseversa

comment.body:
I personally look at the analysis as if/then scenarios. If we’re reversing/stalling at a pivot it means different things than if we cut through it (I use a margin of error for her pivots and targets as well). I like looking for pins EOD and her analysis works well for that along with OD and flows among other things. 

She’s mentioned she has algos for selecting contracts and I’m assuming much more advanced stuff too. Just my $0.02 which ain’t much compared to hers lol
